creator: sdn@slip.net
text:
llnlxdir requires Motif
lesstif fails on make with:
checking for X... no
checking for Xt Revision Number 6... no
checking for Xt Revision Number 5... no
configure: error: You must have X11 Revision 5 or higher to compile Lesstif
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1

Stop.

I believe XFree86 v3330 has the proper xt rev number.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/lesstif
make
